narrative:
S. Bloomfield Township has 1,361 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.5 percentage points.
